Grégory Loubet-Bonino

PhD Student in Software Engineering

Originaire de French, basé à Bern, CH. Passionate about new technology. My background sparked a deep interest in electronics, which eventually led me to robotics. I am now striving to make one of these two fields my primary career path.

"Become who you are, and be what only you can be. — Friedrich Nietzsche"

Work & Experience

2025 - Present

PhD Researcher – Innoguard Project

University of Bern - SEG Team

As part of this PhD, I aim to make robots self-adaptive to dynamic environments using software engineering techniques to enhance safety. I am also working on making sensor monitoring more intelligent.

2025

Internship in Microelectronics

INL Laboratory - FVLLMONTI

Evaluation of different transistor structures (JLNWFET) through simulation. Design and measurement of temperature, voltage, and aging effects. Analysis of consequences at the neural network level.

2023

Internship as an Assistant Engineer

Guillemin, Dijon

Design of mechanical parts for automation. Soldering, testing, and verifying PCBs used in industrial machinery.

2024 - 2026

Freelance PCB Designer

GLB_Corps

Built custom PCBs for various clients (Electric quad startup, Simulator steering wheel, Plasma cutting vacuum system). Managed electronics design and business accounting.
